problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Default. Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
